ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle */,
  "emission_class" TEXT /* Emission class of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle owner */,
  "year_of_manufacture" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_type FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_emission_class FOREIGN KEY ("emission_class") REFERENCES emission_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES vehicle_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the vehicle owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vehicle owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vehicle owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Starting point of the route */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Ending point of the route */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the route in kilometers */,
  "max_speed_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum speed limit on the route */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last inspection date of the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_segments" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road segment */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route that the segment is part of */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the road segment */,
  "segment_length" REAL /* Length of the road segment in kilometers */,
  "max_speed_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum speed limit on the segment */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Last inspection date of the segment */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Current maintenance status of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_road_segments_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment where the signal is located */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic signal (e.g., stoplight, yield) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the traffic signal */,
  "signal_cycle_time" INTEGER /* Cycle time of the traffic signal */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signals_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("edge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., emissions, speed) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("edge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission class */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the emission class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_flow" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic flow data entry */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment where the data is collected */,
  "time" REAL /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles on the segment */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of vehicles on the segment */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of data collection */,
  "traffic_density" INTEGER /* Traffic density around the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_flow_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("edge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission standard */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle type the standard applies to */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emission class the standard applies to */,
  "CO_limit" REAL /* Limit for Carbon Monoxide (CO) emissions */,
  "CO2_limit" REAL /* Limit for Carbon Dioxide (CO2) emissions */,
  "NOx_limit" REAL /* Limit for Nitrogen Oxides (NOx) emissions */,
  "HC_limit" REAL /* Limit for Hydrocarbons (HC) emissions */,
  "PMx_limit" REAL /* Limit for Particulate Matter (PMx) emissions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the emission standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_standards_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_standards_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES emission_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission violation */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle that violated the emission standard */,
  "time" REAL /* Timestamp of the violation */,
  "CO" REAL /* Carbon Monoxide (CO) emission level at the time of violation */,
  "CO2" REAL /* Carbon Dioxide (CO2) emission level at the time of violation */,
  "NOx" REAL /* Nitrogen Oxides (NOx) emission level at the time of violation */,
  "HC" REAL /* Hydrocarbons (HC) emission level at the time of violation */,
  "PMx" REAL /* Particulate Matter (PMx) emission level at the time of violation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the violation */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor that detected the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_violations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_violations_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic incident */,
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the road segment where the incident occurred */,
  "time" REAL /* Timestamp of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of traffic incident (e.g., accident, road closure) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "impact_level" TEXT /* Impact level of the incident */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_incidents_edge_id FOREIGN KEY ("edge_id") REFERENCES road_segments ("edge_id")
)
